description_long: This bungalow features a modern, multi-level design with a combination of stone and white exterior walls. The front area includes a paved driveway with a pink car and a small manicured lawn with bushes. The rear of the property boasts a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, patio furniture, and a hot tub, all enclosed by a white fence. Multiple staircases connect the different levels, and there are several balconies and terraces with railings. Large windows are distributed across all sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall structure is rectangular with clean lines and a flat roof, giving it a contemporary urban appeal.
description: A modern, multi-level bungalow with stone and white walls, large windows, balconies, and a backyard pool. Features include a driveway, manicured lawn, and multiple terraces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, pink car, main entrance stairs, and manicured lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, car, and the transition to the backyard with visible pool and patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with swimming pool, hot tub, patio furniture, and fenced enclosure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the lawn, car, and the full length of the bungalow with terraces and balconies.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows on all sides
